title: Live staged atlas snapshot coherence proof (operator opt-in)
problem: Tickets 278–284 built a coherent atlas_snapshot_v0.1.0 contract thread on fixture-mode DBs only. We need live-research/product proof that a real staged run populates the Research Atlas contract with meaningful graph data—not just well-shaped JSON.
acceptance_criteria: Opt-in live_network pytest runs staged spine on temp DB, exports private atlas snapshot via export-atlas-snapshot, and asserts contract coherence (non-empty cards/nodes/edges, validate_atlas_snapshot, assert_no_private_fields).
Coherence audit documents minimum thresholds and skip reasons when live artifact unsuitable.
Default pytest and golden pass unchanged (live_network excluded).
No public export or public-site changes.
non_goals: CI enforcement of live network proof.
Public atlas route or public-site UI.
Live Ollama per-step fallthrough (mock LLM upstream on staged spine).
category: Phase 3 / live research proof / Research Atlas validation
